name: The Quay — Gala room
description: Innovate takes place in the Gala room at The Quay on Toronto's East waterfront—a contemporary event space with large windows, natural wood accents, and room for focused programming and networking.
directionsNote: Detailed directions, parking guidance, and arrival instructions will be shared with registered attendees closer to the event.
onSite: Single-room program flow for easy navigation between sessions
Lunch and sponsor showcase included for registered attendees
